title: Battle Plan Coruscant

'''Battle Plan Coruscant''' was [[Tsavong Lah]]'s plan to capture [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It consisted of dividing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces into two halves of six [[Cluster (Yuuzhan Vong)|clusters]] each, one stationed at [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] and the other at [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]], and having them converge on Coruscant in a pincer movement. It was put into action in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] after the Yuuzhan Vong were humiliated by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Operation Safe Passage|capture]] of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] hostages from [[Talfaglio]].

The [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|capture of Borleias]] and the [[Battle of Reecee|capture of Reecee]] went as planned, but Tsavong Lah's strategy was undermined by the [[Battle of the Black Bantha]], where the Reecee fleet was detected and wiped out in advance by [[Sien Sovv]]. This resulted in the destruction of his pincer strategy, but to compensate, he resorted to the use of mass human shielding via captured refugee convoys. In the end, the plan resulted in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|capture of Coruscant]].
